fuel.recommended: 98 RON (Ultra Premium) for best performance and economy
fuel.ethanol: Up to 10% ethanol (E10) acceptable. E85 NOT suitable.
fuel.note: Lower octane causes knock sensor intervention → reduced power and economy.

climate_adjustments.air_filter: Every 16,000 km (dust regions may need more frequent)

roadworthy_critical_items: Suspension ball joints and bushes (heat degrades rubber)
Brake pad minimum 3mm, disc minimum thickness
No major fluid leaks (seeping OK, dripping fails)

parts_suppliers.eBay AU: Good source for aftermarket thermostat housings, coils, sensors

currency: AUD — all costs in this knowledge base are in Australian Dollars
